principle: Routine tasks run incident-backed scoped tests. Tests outside lean are dormant for routine work but remain available in full.

gate.description: Completion integrity and evidence protocol regressions.

tests.reason: Spec drift and receipt mismatch previously allowed declarations to diverge from the real task.
Historical false completion and false-positive classification incidents require primary completion verification.
Orchestrator prose acceptance previously lost or generalized concrete requirements before supervisor enqueue and done-gate verification.

Review-loop prompts previously reserialized the complete accumulated history; differential context now requires immutable identity, full-row coverage, hashed project-bounded refs, redacted fallback and independent critique checks.
A structurally valid negative review was previously converted into node.fail and queue.retry instead of retaining the same task review loop.
Negative review routing must distinguish valid rework from malformed or forged review evidence while preserving the implement target.
Claimed exit 0 evidence previously differed from the command's real exit status.
Direct execute previously emitted edge.take to done even when result/implementation/review or structured acceptance explicitly reported incomplete work.
The trusted direct-completion override previously stopped at runFlow parameters because the production queue path dropped the owner decision receipt before ceo-worker.makeSpec.
Completion verification previously reran an unscoped full suite and converted unrelated shared-tree failures into task failure.
The true_done hook boundary must not bypass the primary completion verdict.
Prevents new active blocking hooks without incident provenance and verifies dormant/shadow semantics.
Prevents routine tasks from silently falling back to the full repository suite.
Prevents routine work from paying for multi-round loop engineering while preserving explicit and iterative tasks.
Review and planning nodes previously received duplicated generation knowledge, inflating prompts without improving verification.
Completion and visual rules accumulated into oversized prompts and repeated full-suite instructions.
Secret leakage protection remains foundational and must run in every routine profile.

runtime.description: Queue liveness, orphan recovery and process stability regressions.

tests.reason: Queue state is the control plane source of truth.
incident_refs: docs/设计/玉兔6-三遍自查与稳固清单.md

tests.reason: Orphan cleanup previously killed live engines and also left dead workers behind.
Dead running tasks previously occupied the only engine slot indefinitely.
Restart recovery must not duplicate or lose queue transitions.
Long synchronous work previously blocked the console request path.
incident_refs: docs/设计/玉兔6-架构稳定性审核.md

tests.reason: Memory and worker process growth require bounded architecture checks.
Waiting parent workers repeatedly reparsed the complete event history on every append, consuming a CPU core while no downstream state changed.
Unchanged keepalive and all-blocked audit states dominated the event log and woke waiting workers without adding new state.
The CEO downstream wait path must use incremental event reads, direct queue refs and state-change audit pulses together.
Normal work and repair work require distinct routing lanes.
Project routing previously lost or misclassified project ownership.
incident_refs: docs/设计/玉兔6-三遍自查与稳固清单.md

tests.reason: Text-only or unavailable runners previously failed tasks without a capable fallback.
Repair and quality operations need a complete prompt and agent handoff trail.
incident_refs: docs/设计/玉兔6-协同设计分析.md

tests.reason: Quality audit previously treated an intermediate runner failure as the final chain state even after fallback task.done and queue.completed ok=true.
Large CLI goals were duplicated inline despite a fingerprinted task document, inflating heavy-node token use.

smoke.description: Fast routine contract checks. Each selected test has incident provenance in the gate profile.
